when_to_use: Bot mitigation for new account registration flows
Account takeover prevention at login with MatchKey challenges
Fake account creation blocking for gaming platforms
Risk-based authentication challenge escalation at checkout
Automated abuse prevention for marketplace listing creation

pros: MatchKey puzzles resist solver farms better than reCAPTCHA
Risk-based flow only challenges suspicious traffic
Proven at scale with banks and large marketplaces
Warranty-backed SLAs on bot mitigation outcomes
cons: Enterprise pricing and sales cycle, not dev-friendly
Interactive puzzles add user friction when triggered
Heavy JS payload can impact page performance
Overkill for small SaaS with low abuse traffic
review.verdict: Strong choice for enterprises under active bot attack, but pricing and integration overhead make it wrong for startups.
review.best_for: Banks, marketplaces and gaming platforms facing organized bot and ATO attacks at scale.
review.not_for: Indie SaaS or small e-commerce with modest signup abuse and a tight budget.
